历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 5321 → 4894 → 3665 → 3024, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 2297 places in the past 3 years, and intensifying competition year by year; the 2025 baseline is about 3024 places; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for the Physics Category were 75, 77, 80, and 81 respectively, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 82 students, an increase of 1 student from 2025, an expansion of about 1.2%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 3rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top tier nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, but the overall Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 14th (high popularity), with extremely high overall attention; no obvious gaps in application records; it has A+ disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc., with over 30 disciplines rated A- or above, and its disciplinary strength is top-notch nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of about 44,000 from 2025 (+15.5%), significantly intensifying competition; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, a developed eastern coastal region, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to Sichuan candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan has been slightly increasing in recent years, reflecting its emphasis on Sichuan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (+15.5%), and Zhejiang University's top disciplinary strength and high popularity, despite a slight expansion of 1 student in the enrollment plan, the intensified competition still dominates; the estimated minimum ranking is about 2996, with a range of 2696–3296.
